commands.review_summary:
The PR catches unavailable Discord voice-adapter errors for `audioAsVoice` payloads with visible text, falls back to normal Discord text delivery with reply alias support, and adds a regression test.

PR surface: Source +31, Tests +46. Total +77 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and the linked report: current main sends the first `audioAsVoice` media through `sendVoice` without catching the unavailable adapter error, and the report gives concrete OpenClaw 2026.5.19 cron steps. I did not run a live cron job in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow automated repair is identified; the remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the fallback semantics plus exact-head check gating.
